title: Devtools: refactor from plugin to core command menu
description:
Refactor devtools from a plugin (gated by plugins.devtools config) into a core feature. Replace the floating beaker/lab-glass trigger button with a ⌘ character trigger that opens a command menu (command palette pattern). The trigger becomes a command-trigger, the menu becomes a command-menu.

Key changes:
- Remove plugin gating — devtools is always-on core infrastructure
- Replace beaker SVG icon with ⌘ character on the trigger button
- Rename trigger class from sb-devtools-trigger to sb-command-trigger
- Rename menu from sb-devtools-menu to sb-command-menu
- Unify with the declarative tool registry (modes.config.json) — the command menu should render items from getToolsForMode() instead of hardcoding menu items
- Remove isPluginEnabled(devtools) gate from mountDevTools
- Remove plugins.devtools from storyboard.config.json
- Consider migrating devtools.js to Svelte (using shadcn Command component)

Reference:
- Current implementation: packages/core/src/devtools.js (~500 lines vanilla JS)
- Tool registry: packages/core/src/modes.js (initTools, setToolAction, getToolsForMode)
- Config: modes.config.json (declares viewfinder, scene-info, reset-params, hide-mode, feature-flags as dev tools)
- Currently two parallel systems: floating devtools toolbar (hardcoded) vs declarative tool registry (unused). This refactor unifies them.

title: Remove plugin gating from devtools
description: Remove isPluginEnabled(devtools) check from mountDevTools(). Remove plugins.devtools from storyboard.config.json. Devtools becomes always-on core infrastructure.

title: Replace beaker icon with ⌘ character
description: Replace BEAKER_ICON SVG constant with a ⌘ text character on the trigger button. Update class from sb-devtools-trigger to sb-command-trigger.

title: Rename devtools UI to command menu
description: Rename sb-devtools-menu to sb-command-menu, sb-devtools-wrapper to sb-command-wrapper. Update all CSS classes and DOM references.

title: Wire command menu to tool registry
description: Replace hardcoded menu items in devtools.js with items from getToolsForMode(). Each tool in modes.config.json becomes a command menu item. setToolAction() provides the click handler.

title: Migrate command menu to Svelte + shadcn
description: Replace vanilla JS DOM construction with a Svelte CommandMenu.svelte component using shadcn Command component. Mount via mountSveltePlugin().

title: Remove plugins system if no longer needed
description: If devtools was the only plugin consumer, evaluate removing initPlugins/isPluginEnabled/getPluginsConfig from core exports. Check if any other plugins exist.

title: Update exports and tests
description: Update packages/core/src/index.js exports (mountDevTools → mountCommandMenu or similar). Update devtools.test.js. Verify build, lint, all tests pass.
